name: Asparagus & Pimento
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the asparagus and snap off any tough ends.
2. In a large skillet, bring water to a boil.
3. Add the asparagus to the boiling water.
4. Cover and steam until the asparagus turns bright green, about 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and drain the asparagus.
6. Arrange the asparagus on a platter.
7. Sprinkle with lime juice.
8. Garnish with pimento and pine nuts.
9. Serve warm or chilled.
